CustomField.formula: OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL( ProjectName__r.ProjectStatus__c , "Open")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Package__r.PackageStatus__c , "Open")), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Package__r.PackageSuperior__c )), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Package__r.PackageSuperior__r.PackageStatus__c,"Open")) ) )
CustomField.label: ValNoDeleteProjectPackageClosed
